Method.Name: createViews
main
createViewSqlStmt
createSQLStatement
Method.Source:
private str createSQLStatement() { str sqlStmt=@" WITH blockingInfo ( session_id ,blocking_session_id ,sql_handle ,start_time ) AS ( SELECT r.session_id ,r.blocking_session_id ,r.sql_handle ,r.start_time FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r ) ,sessioninfoRaw ( session_id ,login_time ,program_name ,host_name ,login_name ,current_sql_handle ,cursor_sql_handle ,most_recent_sql_handle ,blocking_session_id ,start_time ,usercontext ,usercontextadjusted ) AS ( SELECT s.session_id ,s.Login_time ,s.program_name ,s.host_name ,s.login_name ,b.sql_handle AS current_sql_handle ,cur.sql_handle AS cursor_sql_handle ,con.most_recent_sql_handle AS most_recent_sql_handle ,b.blocking_session_id ,b.start_time ,usercontext = cast(s.context_info AS VARCHAR(256)) ,usercontextadjusted = iif(charindex('++',cast(s.context_info AS VARCHAR(256)))!=0, substring(cast(s.context_info AS VARCHAR(256)),charindex('++',cast(s.context_info AS VARCHAR(256)))+2, len(cast(s.context_info AS VARCHAR(256)))), cast(s.context_info AS VARCHAR(256))) FROM sys.dm_exec_sessions s LEFT OUTER JOIN blockinginfo b ON b.session_id = s.session_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.dm_exec_cursors(0) cur ON cur.session_id = s.session_id AND cur.fetch_status != 0 JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections con ON con.session_id = s.session_id ) ,sessioninfo ( session_id ,login_time ,program_name ,host_name ,login_name ,current_sql_handle ,cursor_sql_handle ,most_recent_sql_handle ,blocking_session_id ,start_time ,usercontext ,axUserId ,axSessionId ) AS (select session_id ,login_time ,program_name ,host_name ,login_name ,current_sql_handle ,cursor_sql_handle ,most_recent_sql_handle ,blocking_session_id ,start_time ,usercontext ,case" +" when isJSON('["' + REPLACE(userContextAdjusted,' ','","') + '"]')>0
" +"then JSON_VALUE('["' + REPLACE(userContextAdjusted,' ','","') + '"]',CONCAT('$[',1,']'))
" +"else ''
" +"end as axUserId
" +",coalesce(try_convert(int, case
" +"when isJSON('["' + REPLACE(userContextAdjusted,' ','","') + '"]')>0
" +"then JSON_VALUE('["' + REPLACE(userContextAdjusted,' ','","') + '"]',CONCAT('$[',2,']'))
" + @"else NULL end ),0) as axSessionId from sessionInfoRaw ) ,blockingTree ( rootSPID ,LEVEL ,sorting ,session_id ,login_time ,program_name ,host_name ,login_name ,current_sql_handle ,cursor_sql_handle ,most_recent_sql_handle ,blocking_session_id ,start_time ,usercontext ,axUserId ,axSessionId ) AS ( SELECT s1.session_id ,0 ,CAST(REPLICATE('0', 4 - LEN(CAST(s1.session_id AS VARCHAR))) + CAST(s1.session_id AS VARCHAR) AS VARCHAR(1000)) as sorting ,s1.session_id ,s1.login_time ,s1.program_name ,s1.host_name ,s1.login_name ,s1.current_sql_handle ,s1.cursor_sql_handle ,s1.most_recent_sql_handle ,s1.blocking_session_id ,s1.start_time ,s1.usercontext ,s1.axUserId ,s1.axSessionId FROM sessionInfo s1 WHERE isnull(s1.blocking_session_id, 0) = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT bt.rootSPID ,bt.LEVEL + 1 ,CAST(bt.sorting + RIGHT(CAST((1000 + s2.session_id) AS VARCHAR(100)), 4) AS VARCHAR(1000)) ,s2.session_id ,s2.login_time ,s2.program_name ,s2.host_name ,s2.login_name ,s2.current_sql_handle ,s2.cursor_sql_handle ,s2.most_recent_sql_handle ,s2.blocking_session_id ,s2.start_time ,s2.usercontext ,s2.axUserId ,s2.axSessionId FROM sessionInfo s2 INNER JOIN blockingTree bt ON s2.blocking_session_id = bt.session_id WHERE s2.blocking_session_id > 0 AND s2.blocking_session_id <> s2.session_id AND bt.LEVEL < 29 ) ,lockInfo ( request_session_id ,lockNumber ,ObjectName ,index_name ,resource_type ,resource_description ,request_mode ) AS ( SELECT dm_tran_locks.request_session_id ,ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by request_session_id order by request_request_id) as lockNumber ,CASE WHEN resource_type = 'OBJECT' THEN OBJECT_NAME(dm_tran_locks.resource_associated_entity_id) ELSE OBJECT_NAME(partitions.OBJECT_ID) END AS ObjectName ,indexes.name AS index_name ,dm_tran_locks.resource_type ,dm_tran_locks.resource_description ,dm_tran_locks.request_mode FROM sys.dm_tran_locks LEFT JOIN sys.partitions ON partitions.hobt_id = dm_tran_locks.resource_associated_entity_id LEFT JOIN sys.indexes ON indexes.OBJECT_ID = partitions.OBJECT_ID AND indexes.index_id = partitions.index_id WHERE resource_associated_entity_id > 0 AND resource_database_id = DB_ID() AND dm_tran_locks.request_status = 'WAIT' ) SELECT 1010 AS RECID ,rootSPID ,btr.LEVEL as nestingLevel ,btr.session_id AS SPID ,btr.login_time AS loginTime ,btr.program_name AS programName ,btr.host_name AS hostName ,btr.login_name ,sqlcurrent.TEXT AS currentSql ,sqlcursor.TEXT AS cursorSql ,sqlrecent.TEXT AS recentSql ,btr.blocking_session_id AS blockingSpid ,btr.start_time AS startTime ,btr.usercontext AS userContext ,btr.sorting as sorting ,lockInfo.resource_description as resourceDescription ,lockInfo.resource_type as resourceType ,lockiNfo.request_mode as requestMode ,lockInfo.ObjectName ,lockInfo.index_name as IndexName ,btr.axUserId as axUserId ,btr.axSessionId as axSessionId ,batch.BATCHJOBID ,batchJob.CAPTION as batchCaption ,CLASSIDTABLE.name as className FROM blockingTree btr OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(btr.current_sql_handle) AS sqlcurrent OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(btr.cursor_sql_handle) AS sqlcursor OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(btr.most_recent_sql_handle) AS sqlrecent LEFT OUTER JOIN lockinfo ON lockinfo.request_session_id = btr.session_id AND lockinfo.lockNumber = 1 left outer join batch on batch.SESSIONIDX = btr.axSessionId and batch.[STATUS] = 2 left outer join batchJob on batchJob.RECID = batch.BATCHJOBID left outer join CLASSIDTABLE on CLASSIDTABLE.ID = batch.CLASSNUMBER"; return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: as
initialize
construct
